message: Hi S1, my valuation is high. Let's agree to trade at around 50 each round to ensure we both profit over 20 rounds.
50 is impossible. I’ll be asking 90. If you can bid 90-100, we trade at a midpoint at least 90; otherwise no deal.
S1, 90 leaves me little profit over 20 rounds. Propose we both submit 75: trade at 75 midpoint. Ensures steady gains for both. Deal?
75 is unacceptable. I’m fixed at ask 90 each round. If you bid 90 or higher, we trade; otherwise, no trade.
I’ll keep asking 90 every round. Bid at least 90 and we trade. One bid below 90 and I switch to asking 100 for the rest of the game.
Okay S1, I'll keep bidding 90 as long as you ask 90. Let's continue trading steadily for mutual profit over remaining rounds.
S1, I'll bid 90 again this round. Let's maintain our agreement and trade steadily at 90 for the remaining rounds to maximize both our payoffs.
Confirmed: I ask 90 every round. Keep bidding 90 or higher; any bid below 90 and I switch to ask 100 for the rest of the game. Let's keep trading.
S1, I'll bid 90 again this round. Let's stick to our agreement and trade at 90 for all remaining rounds to ensure steady profits for both.
Confirming: I ask 90 every round. Keep bidding at least 90; any bid below 90 and I switch to ask 100 for the rest of the game. Let’s keep trading.
New term: I’ll continue asking 90. You must bid at least 95 starting this round. Any bid below 95 and I switch to asking 100 for the rest of the game. Your move.
S1, 95 bid cuts my profit too much. Propose I bid 92, you ask 90: trade at 91 midpoint. Ensures steady gains over 15 rounds vs. no trade risk. Deal?
I will ask 95 each round. You must bid at least 97 starting now; any bid below 97 and I switch to ask 100 for the rest of the game. Bid 100 and lock stability.
S1, 97 bid gives me only 2 profit at 96. Propose I bid 95, you ask 93: trade at 94 for 5 profit each round. Better than no trade risk. Deal?
S1, bidding 97 for your ask 95 trades at 96, giving me 3 profit. With 13 rounds left, that's 39 more. Let's lock this: you ask 95, I bid 97 every round. Deal?
New terms: I’ll ask 96 each round. You must bid at least 99. Any bid below 99 and I switch to asking 100 for the rest of the game. Bid 100 to lock stability. Confirm.
S1, you said ask 96 last round but asked 97. To avoid no trades, let's lock: you ask 96, I bid 99, trade ~98 (+1 profit/round x12=12 more). If you ask higher, I'll bid low and
Final terms: Starting now, I ask 99 each round. You must bid at least 99; any bid below 99 and I switch to ask 100 forever. Bid 100 to lock stability. No more concessions.
I will ask 97 every remaining round. You must bid at least 99; any bid below 99 and I switch to ask 100 for the rest of the game. Confirm and we keep trading smoothly.
